Maybe mention the benefits of updating like "Stay on top of your financial activities, Avoid unexpected charges, and ensure your account is secure. Maybe add a call to action button like "Verify My Account Details" and a PS. Maybe add a P.S. and a footer with contact info and bank info. Let me put it all together.
